final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_Centroid(omrade) AS centroid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT DISTINCT skredrisikokvikkleireklasse, skredfaregradklasse, skredskadekonsekvensklasse
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlopomr
LIMIT 100;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT objid, skredrisikokvikkleireklasse, omrade
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlopomr
WHERE skredrisikokvikkleireklasse = (
  SELECT (max(skredrisikokvikkleireklasse::int))::text FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlopomr
);

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 4: spatial_join
-- left_source: 3
-- right_source: 1
-- join_type: "intersects"
-- left_geom: "omrade"
-- right_geom: "omrade"

1.description: get Trondheim municipality geometry and centroid

3.description: select kvikkleire polygons filtered to the high risk class and intersecting Trondheim extent

4.description: select buildings in Trondheim with geometry

5.description: find buildings that intersect the reduced kvikkleire polygons

6.description: compute distance from each intersecting building to municipality centroid

7.description: collapse to one row per building taking MIN(distance_m)

FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlopomr

final_sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_Centroid(omrade) AS centroid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Trondheim%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT DISTINCT skredrisikokvikkleireklasse
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlopomr
LIMIT 100;

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 3: query [kvikkleire]
SELECT omrade, skredrisikokvikkleireklasse
FROM kvikkleire_175185730654415d8841436d0d6999f2.utlopomr
WHERE skredrisikokvikkleireklasse = '5';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --
